strategy.name: 20 SMA Crossover + 200 SMA Trend Filter + Trend Friend VWAP
strategy.description: Three filters, each doing a different job. 200 SMA for macro trend direction, VWAP (Trend Friend) for session bias, 20 SMA crossover for entry timing. All three must align before a trade fires.

indicators.sma_200: Macro trend filter. Price above SMA(200) = uptrend. Below = downtrend. No longs in a downtrend, no shorts in an uptrend.
indicators.vwap: Session bias via Trend Friend. Price above VWAP = buyers in control. Below = sellers. Resets at midnight UTC.
indicators.sma_20: Entry timing. A crossover above SMA(20) in a bullish trend triggers a long. A crossover below SMA(20) in a bearish trend triggers a short.

long: Price is above SMA(200) — macro uptrend confirmed
Price is above VWAP — Trend Friend bullish, buyers in control for the session
Price crosses above SMA(20) — entry signal triggered
short: Price is below SMA(200) — macro downtrend confirmed
Price is below VWAP — Trend Friend bearish, sellers in control for the session
Price crosses below SMA(20) — entry signal triggered

exit_rules: Exit long when price closes below SMA(20) — fast MA lost, momentum shifting
Exit long when price drops below VWAP or SMA(200) — trend filters invalidated
Exit short when price closes above SMA(20)
Hard stop: 1% below entry for longs, 1% above entry for shorts
risk_rules: Risk maximum 1% of portfolio per trade
Maximum trade size capped by MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD in .env
Maximum trades per day capped by MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY in .env
Paper trade first — validate this strategy on your specific asset before going live
notes: Trend-following strategy. Works best on 1H and above. The 200 SMA requires 200 candles of history — ensure your timeframe has sufficient data.
